articles.title: Matthieu Blazy’s Chanel debut fuels China expansion despite luxury slowdown
articles.summary: Chanel is betting on long-term growth in China, opening new boutiques and beauty stores as excitement over Matthieu Blazy’s first collections builds, even as the wider luxury industry faces softer dem

articles.title: Commentary: This energy crisis hurts Filipino professionals already struggling on one pay cheque
articles.summary: For Filipino urban professionals, earning a living requires paying a premium to stay connected and employable, says Nicasio Pimentel from the University of Antique.

articles.title: As Singapore's EV uptake soars, drivers and experts say it's not how many chargers, but where and wh
articles.summary: With EVs now accounting for more than half of new car registrations, the focus is shifting from how many charging points exist to whether they are where drivers actually need them.

articles.title: Commentary: Iran is pressing its strategic advantage by eyeing fees on undersea cables in Strait of
articles.summary: Iran's proposal to charge fees on undersea cables beneath the Strait of Hormuz may never become workable policy, but it reveals an ambition suited to Iran’s circumstances, says this writer.

articles.title: Commentary: The haze over Southeast Asia clouds more than the sky
articles.summary: The annual haze blanketing Indonesia, Malaysia and Singapore is the visible outcome of political and economic choices, says this researcher.

articles.title: UK eases sanctions on Russian jet fuel and diesel imports
articles.summary: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer said the move would ensure “less Russian oil on the market, with Russia weaker as a result.”

articles.title: Stylish Aston Villa win Europa League to end 30-year trophy drought
articles.summary: Aston Villa beat Freiburg 3-0 to win the Europa League final and end a 30-year trophy drought.

articles.title: Can AI, automation improve your public transport experience? Most commuters say yes
articles.summary: A top concern among younger commuters is the potential lack of human oversight, a survey reveals.

articles.title: Students stand to win rewards, lucky draw prizes when activating ST accounts, reading
articles.summary: From May 20 to 31, The Straits Times is running the first of a multi-part rewards campaign for polytechnic and ITE students.

articles.title: At least $19 million lost to business payment redirection scams since January
articles.summary: In these scams, victims are deceived into changing their vendors’ payment account details on record.

articles.summary: They were believed to have agreed to restrict their output of shipping containers.

articles.summary: The affected product is Glenisk Baby Organic Fromage Frais Strawberry with Banana, Vanilla & Oats (4x60g) from Ireland.

articles.summary: The operation involved more than 3,200 law enforcement officers from 10 territories.

articles.title: Singapore emerging as potential regional leader in global fusion energy race
articles.summary: Singapore is a model system for what a future fusion-powered urban society could look like.

articles.title: Malaysian woman nabbed over role in scam with fake ‘government officials’; 26th arrested since March
articles.summary: The suspect was allegedly handed with $13,700 in cash and gold items belonging to the victim.
